hero.headline: Reserve a Table
hero.subline: We look forward to welcoming you for an unforgettable evening.

policies.parking: Street parking available on West 72nd Street. The closest garage is at 160 West 73rd Street.
policies.dress_code: Smart casual. We kindly ask that guests refrain from athletic wear and flip-flops.
policies.cancellation: We kindly request 24 hours notice for cancellations. Late cancellations or no-shows may be charged a $25 per person fee.
policies.accessibility: Our dining room is fully wheelchair accessible. Please let us know of any accessibility needs when making your reservation.
policies.large_party: For parties of 8 or more, please call us directly at (212) 555-0142 or inquire about our private dining options.

privateDining.headline: Hosting a Private Event?
privateDining.description: Our private dining room seats up to 40 guests for intimate celebrations, corporate dinners, and special occasions.

faq.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faq.answer: We kindly request 24 hours notice for cancellations. Late cancellations or no-shows may be charged a $25 per person fee.

faq.question: Is there a dress code?
faq.answer: Smart casual. We kindly ask that guests refrain from athletic wear and flip-flops.

faq.question: Can I make a reservation for a large group?
faq.answer: For parties of 8 or more, please call us directly at (212) 555-0142. We also offer private dining for groups up to 40.

faq.question: Do you accommodate dietary restrictions?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Please note any allergies or dietary needs in the 'Special Requests' field when booking, and our kitchen will prepare accordingly.

faq.question: Is parking available?
faq.answer: Street parking is available on West 72nd Street. The closest garage is at 160 West 73rd Street, a short walk from the restaurant.
